creator: Donald J. Trump For President
description: I'm Donald Trump and I approve this message. We are going to take our country and we're going to fix it, we're going to make it great again. We are going to fix our health. We are going to take care of our vets. We are going to fix our military. We are going to strengthen our borders, we're going to build the wall, but we are going to strengthen our borders, we are going to make it great again, we're going to make it greater than ever before, thank you.
